calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Csaa Insurance Exchange?S Petition For The Appointment Of A Third, Neutral Appraiser
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ANDREW COLLIER, Esq. of Pacific Law Partners, LLP (tel: 510-841-7777) for Petitioner CSAA Insurance Exchange.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE's Hearing On Petition For The Appointment Of A Third, Neutral Appraiser.

Matter discussed. The Court notes respondent is not present. Counsel Andrew Collier states he was not able to serve the respondent Xavier Fuller. Counsel Andrew Collier states a request for dismissal has been submitted for filing and it is currently pending. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court takes the matter off calendar.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Csaa Insurance Exchange?S Petition For The Appointment Of A Third, Neutral Appraiser
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
